sent_simp: 他用无人机拍摄了山区的风景。
sent_trad: 他用無人機拍攝了山區的風景。
pinyin: Tā yòng wúrénjī pāishè le shānqū de fēngjǐng.
english: He used a drone to film the mountain scenery.

sent_simp: 年轻人属于改革的新派。
sent_trad: 年輕人屬於改革的新派。
english: The young people belong to the reformist new faction.

sent_simp: 他的爷爷老死在故乡，享年八十五岁。
sent_trad: 他的爺爺老死在故鄉，享年八十五歲。
pinyin: Tā de yéye lǎo sǐ zài gùxiāng, xiǎng nián bāshí wǔ suì.
english: His grandfather died of old age in his hometown at the age of eighty-five.
